mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2011-07 RSAFS vintage value was 390422 million dollars
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor income and weaker consumption expectations, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:2011-07 UNRATE vintage value was 9.1 percent
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered returns are not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation accelerates while the federal funds rate remains near zero, real income pressure and limited policy room dominate discount-rate support, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:2011-07 FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.07 percent
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-CPI and low-FEDFUNDS state has average 20-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional mean or if the interaction coefficient is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals weakening real activity and operating leverage pressure for cyclical firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 3-month contractions are followed by nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if negative INDPRO momentum has Rank IC above -0.03 in absolute failure direction.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts from depressed levels signals improving household formation and construction demand, lifting cyclicals and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month growth crosses above 10% after the level has been below 700 thousand units
evidence_refs: fact:2011-06 HOUST vintage value was 629 thousand units
failure_condition: Reject if triggered housing rebounds do not produce above-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns or if the hit rate for positive returns after triggers is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A higher federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future earnings and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2011-07 FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.07 percent
failure_condition: Reject if higher FEDFUNDS levels or increases are not associated with lower subsequent 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests, or if rolling Rank IC is greater than -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth combined with a non-rising unemployment rate confirms broad labor-market healing, supporting income expectations and risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average monthly change crosses above 100 thousand while UNRATE does not rise over the same 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:2011-07 PAYEMS vintage value was 131190 thousand persons
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-growth and stable-UNRATE condition has average 20-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional mean or if its interaction term is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth is positive and retail sales are also rising, demand breadth confirms that aggregate activity is translating into sales, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses above 0% while RSAFS 3-month growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:2011-04 GDPC1 vintage value was 13270.1 billions of chained 2017 dollars
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-GDPC1 and positive-RSAFS condition does not raise average 5-day S&P 500 returns above baseline or if the walk-forward hit rate is below 50%.
